---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Pemetrexed 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Pemetrexed</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Pemetrexed 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Malignant pleural mesothelioma Pemetrexed Fresenius Kabi in combination with cisplatin is indicated for the treatment of chemotherapy naïve patients with unresectable malignant pleural mesothelioma....</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L3</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>malignant peritoneal mesothelioma（100.0%）</li>
<li>pleural adenomatoid tumor（100.0%）</li>
<li>pleural mesothelioma（100.0%）</li>
<li>pleural epithelioid mesothelioma（100.0%）</li>
<li>pleural sarcomatoid mesothelioma（100.0%）</li>
<li>pleural biphasic mesothelioma（100.0%）</li>
<li>pericardium cancer（100.0%）</li>
<li>well differentiated papillary mesothelioma（100.0%）</li>
<li>lymphohistiocytoid mesothelioma（100.0%）</li>
<li>malignant mesothelioma (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>iminoglycinuria（100.0%）</li>
<li>male infertility with teratozoospermia due to single gene mutation（100.0%）</li>
<li>rhabdomyosarcoma (disease)（99.9%）</li>
<li>botryoid-type embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma of the vagina（99.9%）</li>
<li>extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>embryonal extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>parameningeal embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>prostate embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>liver sarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（99.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/pemetrexed/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
